skills.name: moomoo-news-search
skills.description: List the latest moomoo news / articles / announcements / research reports for a single stock (retrieval only, no interpretation). Default for plain 'any news on X?' questions.
skills.discovery_hint: DEFAULT skill for single-stock news-LISTING questions. Trigger when (a) request contains an info noun: news, article, announcement, notice, research report, headline, update, 新闻, 消息, 最新消息, 最近消息, 公告, 资讯, 文章, 研报; OR (b) request is a question-form news query like '特斯拉最近有什么新闻？', 'NVDA 有没有新闻？', '最近什么消息？', 'what news on X', 'any news on X', 'latest news on X'. DO NOT trigger on bare single-stock mentions with no news keyword/question. DO NOT trigger on interpret/digest/analyze/summarize requests (→ moomoo-stock-digest). DO NOT trigger on sentiment / 看多看空 / 风向 (→ moomoo-comment-sentiment). Lists only; never interprets.

skills.name: moomoo-stock-digest
skills.description: Interpret / summarize / digest the latest news for ONE stock and produce a directional read (interpretation-only; NOT a raw news list, NOT community sentiment)
skills.discovery_hint: Trigger ONLY when the request explicitly contains an interpret/summary VERB — digest, interpret, summarize, summary, analyze, analysis, what does this mean, 解读, 点评, 分析, 总结, 摘要. DO NOT trigger on bare single-stock mentions. DO NOT trigger on plain news-listing questions like '有什么新闻 / 有没有新闻 / 最近什么新闻 / 最近发生了什么 / what news / any news / latest news / recent news / what's happening with X' — those go to moomoo-news-search. DO NOT trigger on sentiment / 看多看空 / 风向 questions (→ moomoo-comment-sentiment).

skills.name: moomoo-comment-sentiment
skills.description: Judge bullish vs bearish SENTIMENT for a stock from moomoo community discussions (sentiment-only, not news listing, not news interpretation)
skills.discovery_hint: User explicitly asks about SENTIMENT / mood / community opinion / market wind for a stock — request must contain a sentiment-style keyword (sentiment, bullish, bearish, 看多, 看空, 情绪, 社区情绪, 舆情, 风向, 散户怎么看, community mood, retail tone, discussion tone). DO NOT trigger on a bare single-stock mention with no such keyword. DO NOT trigger on news LISTING requests (that's moomoo-news-search). DO NOT trigger on news INTERPRETATION / digest requests (that's moomoo-stock-digest). Sentiment is derived from community posts, not news.

skills.name: moomooapi
skills.discovery_hint: User mentions quotes, prices, K-line, order book, trading, positions, account, options, or other OpenAPI features

skills.name: install-moomoo-opend
skills.description: Install / upgrade Moomoo OpenD and Python SDK
skills.discovery_hint: User mentions installing, downloading, launching, configuring OpenD or upgrading moomoo SDK

skills.name: moomoo-capital-anomaly
skills.discovery_hint: User asks about capital flow, institutional activity, large/small orders, who is buying/selling, broker trades, short selling, or gives a broad anomaly request like 'NVDA anomaly'

skills.name: moomoo-derivatives-anomaly
skills.discovery_hint: User asks about options, derivatives, warrants, IV, implied volatility, PCR, unusual option activity, put/call sentiment, or gives a broad anomaly request like 'TSLA anomaly'

skills.name: moomoo-technical-anomaly
skills.discovery_hint: User asks about technical signals, K-line patterns, golden/death cross, overbought/oversold, MACD, RSI, KDJ, CCI, or gives a broad anomaly request like 'AAPL any anomalies'
